channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Stone Age Anvil
item.description: Stone age anvils for when that first copper anvil seems so expensive and far away...

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: Food Shelves
item.description: Contains various food shelves and food storage, mainly made to be used alongside Expanded Foods.

item.title: Outgoing Damage Log
item.description: Adds outgoing damage to the damage log.

item.title: Genelib
item.description: A library for other mods to calculate genetic inheritance

item.title: The Working Classes - Whetstone Patch
item.description: A focused compatibility and bug-fix fork of The Working Classes for Vintage Story

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Flower Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing/farming flowers!

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Wearable body tools and universal classes for Animalica player species.

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: Grindable Arrows
item.description: Sharpen your arrows on a grinding wheel to shoot your enemies with more powerful arrows

item.title: xLib Fork
item.description: XLib provides an interface to add skills, abilities and effects to the game.

item.title: No Offhand Pickup Forked
item.description: Prevent the pickup of items into your off-hand.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Fishman's Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for the Fishman's tale server.

item.title: Keep Rapids
item.description: Allows placing multiple water wheels on a single rapid stream by keeping the water as rapids.

item.title: Peat for Charcoal
item.description: Allows using peat bricks as a substitute for firewood in the charcoal making process.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Gearlock Firearms
item.description: Adds firearms powered by the gearlock mechanism

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Dead
item.description: Leaves a lootable corpse of the player (with their exact skin and worn gear) at the death spot

item.title: Antique Harmony | Music Additions / Alternative Soundtrack
item.description: Adds to/replaces soundtrack with original orchestral one, written for the game.

item.title: Layout
item.description: Layout tool that produces inert, uninteractable 2D/3D voxel guidelines in various shapes.

item.title: GGBC's Model Tweaks
item.description: Optimizes Models without notable visual difference. Fixes Z-fighting.

item.title: TFK Flower Farming
item.description: A compat patch to allow for crafting seeds from modded flowers.

item.title: Dar's Commands
item.description: Some fun admin commands.

item.title: THUGCOOP - BB Patches
item.description: Stat edits to tools and items for thugcoop

item.title: Dar's Server Utilities
item.description: Combines my mods with the intent to be used specifically on Sundered Isles Server

item.title: Packrat Fork
item.description: Packrat adds a Storage Browser that lets you view and search the contents of all nearby containers.

item.title: Better coal
item.description: Changes the combustion time and temperature of the coke

item.title: Ice Cold Vessel
item.description: Adds ice-powered cooling to storage vessels for food preservation.
